apiSummary: The xxHash fast hashing library: one-shot and streaming XXH32, XXH64 and XXH3 (64 and 128-bit), canonical (big-endian) representations and secret generation.

spanSkip.XXH3_64bits_reset_withSecret: the secret is referenced until the streaming session ends, a span cannot outlive the call
spanSkip.XXH3_64bits_reset_withSecretandSeed: the secret is referenced until the streaming session ends, a span cannot outlive the call
spanSkip.XXH3_128bits_reset_withSecret: the secret is referenced until the streaming session ends, a span cannot outlive the call
spanSkip.XXH3_128bits_reset_withSecretandSeed: the secret is referenced until the streaming session ends, a span cannot outlive the call

skipConstants.XXH_SCALAR: XXH_VECTOR compile-time dispatch value, meaningless through the shared library
skipConstants.XXH_SSE2: XXH_VECTOR compile-time dispatch value, meaningless through the shared library
skipConstants.XXH_AVX2: XXH_VECTOR compile-time dispatch value, meaningless through the shared library
skipConstants.XXH_AVX512: XXH_VECTOR compile-time dispatch value, meaningless through the shared library
skipConstants.XXH_NEON: XXH_VECTOR compile-time dispatch value, meaningless through the shared library
skipConstants.XXH_VSX: XXH_VECTOR compile-time dispatch value, meaningless through the shared library
skipConstants.XXH_SVE: XXH_VECTOR compile-time dispatch value, meaningless through the shared library
skipConstants.XXH_LSX: XXH_VECTOR compile-time dispatch value, meaningless through the shared library
